rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FELIPE R. VELA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition By The Ibarra Professional Law Corporation To Compel The Administrator To Pay The Statutory Fees Pursuant To The Order For Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD CHANDLER STEVENS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/3/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to attorney with the following issues: 1) Proposed order has not been filed. 2) The supplemental declaration filed on 9/10/25 amends the petition. Therefore, it must be filed as an Amendment to the First and Final Report and notice given thereon prior to any review. 3) Small Estate Affidavits must be pursuant to California Probate Code 13100 et seq. An original certified copy of the death certificate and DE-300 must also be attached. The affidavit must be filed in person, not e-filed. The proposed distribution will be reviewed once these are properly filed. 4) Judy Benes has not been given notice. 5) It does not appear that the cash is fully FDIC insured ($295K is on hand). Proof of full insurance will be needed prior to the estate closing. 6) c/o notice is insufficient. Charles McKenna must be given direct notice unless his consent to c/o notice is filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EILEEN P GUERRA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Preliminary Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/19/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to attorney with the following issues: 1. Please allege whether all ascertainable creditors have been given notice and when the last date of notice was provided. 2. Please provide a fuller allegation regarding notice required under PC 9202 including the specific reasons why notice was not required or the date notice was given. 3. Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. 4. Notice of Hearing has not been filed (needed on all trust beneficiaries). 5. Proposed Order has not been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JUNE FISHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/3/25. Examiner's Notes email to attorney with the following issues: 1) A written renunciation should be filed by those who are entitled to priority for appointment, but who do not desire to act. Where not filed, the petition should indicate the reason [Local Rule 14.24]. 2) Notice is needed on the San Francisco Public Administrator (not City Administrator). 3) The Duties and Liabilities must contain the proposed administrator's address and phone number, not the attorney's. The form must be re-filed.
